targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total Users" FROM "User"

panels.title: Active Users
panels.description: Users with at least one activity in the selected period

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Active Users" FROM "UserActivity" WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

panels.title: New Users
panels.description: Users registered in the selected period

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "New Users" FROM "User" WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Searches" FROM "UserActivity" WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Plays" FROM "UserActivity" WHERE activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Exports" FROM "UserActivity" WHERE activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Shares" FROM "UserActivity" WHERE activity_type = 'SHARE' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Media") AS "Media",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Episode") AS "Episodes",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Segment") AS "Segments"

SELECT
  date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time,
  activity_type AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(total) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS "7d Trend"
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS total
  FROM "UserActivity"
  WHERE created_at >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days') AND created_at <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  GROUP BY 1
) sub
WHERE day >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  search_query AS "Search Query",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Unique Users"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH'
  AND search_query IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY search_query
ORDER BY "Count" DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
  COALESCE(a.anime_name, m.romaji_name, m.english_name, 'Unknown') AS "Media",
  COUNT(*) AS "Total",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY') AS "Plays",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT') AS "Exports",
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS "Users"
FROM "UserActivity" a
LEFT JOIN "Media" m ON m.id = a.media_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(a.created_at)
  AND a.media_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY "Total" DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
  COALESCE(a.provider_id, 'email') AS "Provider",
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS "Users"
FROM "User" u
LEFT JOIN account a ON a.user_id = u.id
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY "Users" DESC

SELECT
  date_trunc('day', u.created_at) AS time,
  CASE COALESCE(a.provider_id, 'email') WHEN 'credential' THEN 'email' ELSE COALESCE(a.provider_id, 'email') END AS metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS value
FROM "User" u
LEFT JOIN account a ON a.user_id = u.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.created_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS "7d Trend"
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM "User"
  WHERE created_at >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days') AND created_at <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  GROUP BY 1
) sub
WHERE day >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  u.username AS "Name",
  u.email AS "Email",
  u.role AS "Role",
  COALESCE(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT a.provider_id), ', '), 'email') AS "Providers",
  u.created_at::date AS "Registered",
  GREATEST(u.last_login, MAX(s.updated_at), MAX(ua_last.last_activity)) AS "Last Seen",
  COALESCE(ua_stats.searches, 0) AS "Searches",
  COALESCE(ua_stats.plays, 0) AS "Plays",
  COALESCE(ua_stats.exports, 0) AS "Exports",
  COALESCE(ua_stats.total, 0) AS "Total Activity",
  COALESCE(coll.count, 0) AS "Collections",
  COALESCE(q.request_count, 0) AS "API Reqs",
  CASE WHEN u.banned THEN 'BANNED' WHEN NOT u.is_active THEN 'INACTIVE' ELSE 'ACTIVE' END AS "Status"
FROM "User" u
LEFT JOIN account a ON a.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN session s ON s.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, MAX(created_at) AS last_activity FROM "UserActivity" GROUP BY user_id) ua_last ON ua_last.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH') AS searches,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY') AS plays,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT') AS exports
  FROM "UserActivity" GROUP BY user_id
) ua_stats ON ua_stats.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM "Collection" GROUP BY user_id) coll ON coll.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN "AccountQuotaUsage" q ON q.user_id = u.id
  AND q.period_yyyymm = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM now())::int * 100 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM now())::int
GROUP BY u.id, ua_stats.searches, ua_stats.plays, ua_stats.exports, ua_stats.total, coll.count, q.request_count
ORDER BY COALESCE(ua_stats.total, 0) DESC

SELECT
  date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Active Users"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(dau) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS "7d Trend"
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS dau
  FROM "UserActivity"
  WHERE created_at >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days') AND created_at <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  GROUP BY 1
) sub
WHERE day >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Searches",
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Unique Searchers"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  hour AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY hour ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS "24h Trend"
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM "UserActivity"
  WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH'
    AND created_at >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '24 hours') AND created_at <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  GROUP BY 1
) sub
WHERE hour >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Exports"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS "7d Trend"
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM "UserActivity"
  WHERE activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT'
    AND created_at >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days') AND created_at <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  GROUP BY 1
) sub
WHERE day >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tracking Opt-Out
panels.description: Users who disabled activity tracking in settings

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Opted Out" FROM "User" WHERE preferences->'searchHistory'->>'enabled' = 'false'

panels.title: Search Volume (all users incl. anonymous)
panels.description: Total POST /v1/search HTTP requests — includes anonymous users. From OTel HTTP metrics.

panels.title: User Funnel
panels.description: Registered → Searched → Exported → Has API Key

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  'Registered' AS "Stage", COUNT(*) AS "Users" FROM "User"
UNION ALL SELECT 'Searched', COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM "UserActivity" WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH'
UNION ALL SELECT 'Played', COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM "UserActivity" WHERE activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY'
UNION ALL SELECT 'Exported', COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM "UserActivity" WHERE activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT'
UNION ALL SELECT 'Has API Key', COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM "ApiAuth" WHERE is_active

panels.title: Time to First Search
panels.description: How quickly do users search after registering?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN mins < 5 THEN '< 5 min'
    WHEN mins < 60 THEN '5-60 min'
    WHEN mins < 1440 THEN '1-24 hours'
    WHEN mins < 10080 THEN '1-7 days'
    ELSE '7+ days'
  END AS "Time",
  COUNT(*) AS "Users"
FROM (
  SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MIN(ua.created_at) - u.created_at)) / 60 AS mins
  FROM "User" u
  JOIN "UserActivity" ua ON ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.activity_type = 'SEARCH'
  GROUP BY u.id, u.created_at
) sub
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(mins)

panels.title: Engagement Depth (plays/day)
panels.description: How many segments does a user play per active day?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN plays BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN '1-5 (browsing)'
    WHEN plays BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN '6-20 (casual)'
    WHEN plays BETWEEN 21 AND 50 THEN '21-50 (studying)'
    ELSE '50+ (power user)'
  END AS "Depth",
  COUNT(*) AS "User-Days"
FROM (
  SELECT user_id, date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY') AS plays
  FROM "UserActivity"
  WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  GROUP BY user_id, day
  HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY') > 0
) sub
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(plays)

panels.title: Content Exploration (anime per user)
panels.description: How many different anime does each user explore?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN anime_count = 1 THEN '1 anime'
    WHEN anime_count BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '2-5 anime'
    WHEN anime_count BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10 anime'
    ELSE '10+ anime'
  END AS "Breadth",
  COUNT(*) AS "Users"
FROM (
  SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT media_id) AS anime_count
  FROM "UserActivity"
  WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND media_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY user_id
) sub
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(anime_count)

panels.title: API Key vs Web-Only Exporters
panels.description: Comparing export behavior by access method

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN has_api_key THEN 'API Key' ELSE 'Web Only' END AS "Type",
  COUNT(*) AS "Users",
  SUM(exports) AS "Total Exports",
  ROUND(AVG(exports), 1) AS "Avg Exports/User"
FROM (
  SELECT u.id,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "ApiAuth" ak WHERE ak.user_id = u.id AND ak.is_active) AS has_api_key,
    COUNT(*) AS exports
  FROM "User" u
  JOIN "UserActivity" ua ON ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT'
  GROUP BY u.id
) sub
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY "Total Exports" DESC

panels.title: Inactive Users
panels.description: Registered users who never performed key actions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT has_any) AS "Never Active",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_search AND NOT has_play) AS "Searched, Never Played",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_play AND NOT has_export) AS "Played, Never Exported"
FROM (
  SELECT u.id,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "UserActivity" ua WHERE ua.user_id = u.id) AS has_any,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "UserActivity" ua WHERE ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.activity_type = 'SEARCH') AS has_search,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "UserActivity" ua WHERE ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY') AS has_play,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "UserActivity" ua WHERE ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT') AS has_export
  FROM "User" u
) sub

panels.title: Quota Usage This Month
panels.description: Top API users by quota consumption

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  u.username AS "User",
  u.email AS "Email",
  ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT aa.name), ', ') AS "Key Names",
  u.monthly_quota_limit AS "Quota Limit",
  COALESCE(q.request_count, 0) AS "Used",
  u.monthly_quota_limit - COALESCE(q.request_count, 0) AS "Remaining",
  CASE WHEN u.monthly_quota_limit > 0
    THEN ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(q.request_count, 0) / u.monthly_quota_limit, 1)
    ELSE 0
  END AS "Usage %"
FROM "User" u
JOIN "ApiAuth" aa ON aa.user_id = u.id AND aa.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN "AccountQuotaUsage" q ON q.user_id = u.id
  AND q.period_yyyymm = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM now())::int * 100 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM now())::int
GROUP BY u.id, q.request_count
ORDER BY COALESCE(q.request_count, 0) DESC

SELECT
  u.username AS "User",
  aa.name AS "Key Name",
  aa.hint AS "Hint",
  CASE WHEN aa.is_active THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'INACTIVE' END AS "Status",
  ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT p.api_permission), ', ') AS "Permissions",
  aa.created_at::date AS "Created"
FROM "ApiAuth" aa
JOIN "User" u ON u.id = aa.user_id
LEFT JOIN "ApiAuthPermission" p ON p.api_auth_id = aa.id
GROUP BY aa.id, u.username
ORDER BY aa.created_at DESC
SELECT category AS "Category", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM "Media" GROUP BY category ORDER BY "Count" DESC
SELECT airing_status AS "Status", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM "Media" GROUP BY airing_status ORDER BY "Count" DESC
SELECT airing_format AS "Format", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM "Media" GROUP BY airing_format ORDER BY "Count" DESC
SELECT unnest(genres) AS "Genre", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM "Media" GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY "Count" DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT studio AS "Studio", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM "Media" WHERE studio IS NOT NULL GROUP BY studio ORDER BY "Count" DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT content_rating AS "Rating", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM "Segment" WHERE content_rating IS NOT NULL GROUP BY content_rating ORDER BY "Count" DESC

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Collection") AS "Total Collections",
  (SELECT ROUND(AVG(cnt)::numeric, 1) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "CollectionSegment" GROUP BY collection_id) sub) AS "Avg Size"
SELECT collection_type || ' / ' || visibility AS "Type", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM "Collection" GROUP BY collection_type, visibility ORDER BY "Count" DESC

SELECT
  c.name AS "Name",
  u.username AS "Owner",
  c.collection_type AS "Type",
  c.visibility AS "Visibility",
  COUNT(cs.segment_id) AS "Segments"
FROM "Collection" c
JOIN "User" u ON u.id = c.user_id
LEFT JOIN "CollectionSegment" cs ON cs.collection_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, u.username
ORDER BY "Segments" DESC
LIMIT 20
